flavor: "Wow me."
name: Minotaur
text: [star] Forced Interrupt: Minotaur's attacks gain piercing. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Minotaur attacks, place 2 investment counters on Roxxon Energy. If Roxxon's stock is high Minotaur gets +1 for that attack.

name: Minotaur
text: [star] Forced Interrupt: Minotaur's attacks gain piercing. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Minotaur activates, place 2 investment counters on Roxxon Energy. If Roxxon's stock is high, deal Minotaur an additional boost card for that activation.

flavor: Dario Agger AKA The Minotaur has taken over as Roxxon CEO and is rapidly expanding the company.
name: Rapid Expansion
text: Contents: Minotaur (I) and (II). (Minotaur (II) and (III) instead for expert mode.) Roxxon and one modular encounter set (recommended: Corporate Meddling). Setup: Set aside each Dark Council side scheme and put a random one into play. Put the Roxxon Energy environment into play. Shuffle the encounter deck. Advance to 1B.

name: Rapid Expansion
text: [star] Forced Response: After resolving step one of the villain phase, place 1[per_hero] investment counters on Roxxon Energy.

flavor: Roxxon Energy reveals itself to be at the heart of a Dark Council conspiring to conquer the Ten Realms, and Dario Agger has the rights to mine each realm for it's resources!
name: War Of The Realms
text: When Revealed: Deal each player a facedown encounter card. If Roxxon's stock is high, deal each player 2 facedown encounter cards instead.

name: War Of The Realms
text: When Revealed: Put a random set-aside Dark Council side scheme into play. [star] Forced Response: After resolving step one of the villain phase, place 1[per_hero] investment counters on Roxxon Energy. If this scheme is completed, the players lose the game.

flavor: An unlikely cabal has come together under the leadership of Malekith the Accursed. If you can track down his conspirators perhaps you can stop his nefarious plan.
name: Dark Council
text: Hinder 1[per_hero]. When defeated: Flip this card.

flavor: "The War of the Realms can't be stopped."
name: Loki
text: Victory 1. Loki engages the first player. Forced Response: After the villain activates, heal all damage from Loki and confuse your identity.

flavor: An unlikely cabal has come together under the leadership of Malekith the Accursed. If you can track down his conspirators perhaps you can stop his nefarious plan.

text: Hinder 1[per_hero]. When defeated: Flip this card.

flavor: An unlikely cabal has come together under the leadership of Malekith the Accursed. If you can track down his conspirators perhaps you can stop his nefarious plan.

text: Hinder 1[per_hero]. When defeated: Flip this card.

flavor: "I am the greatest sorceress in the history of Asgard."
name: Enchantress
text: Victory 1. Enchantress engages the first player. The player who Enchantress is engaged with cannot play ATTACK events.

name: Roxxon Energy
text: While there are 5 [per_hero] or more investment counters on Roxxon Energy, Roxxon's stock is high. Hero Interrupt: When a player would deal any amount of damage to Minotaur, they may remove that many investment counters from Roxxon Energy instead.

name: Roxxon Guard
text: Guard. [star] If Roxxon's stock is high, Roxxon Guard gets +3 hit points When Defeated: Remove 1 investment counter from Roxxon Energy.

name: Roxxon Tank
text:
Toughness.
[star] If Roxxon's stock is high, Roxxon Tank gets +2 ATK.

name: Media Blitz
text: When revealed: If Roxxon's stock is high, place 2 [per_hero] threat on this scheme. When defeated: Remove 2 investment counters from Roxxon Energy.

name: Rapid Mining Expansion
text: When revealed: If Roxxon's stock is high, place 2 [per_hero] threat on this scheme. Forced Response: After a player deck runs out of cards, place 3 threat on the main scheme.

name: Universal Bank Meeting
text: When Revealed: If Roxxon's stock is high, place 2 [per_hero] threat on this scheme. When defeated: Remove 2 investment counters from Roxxon Energy.

name: Air Support
text:
When Revealed: Take 2 indirect damage (take 4 indirect damage instead if Roxxon's stock is high.)
[star] Boost: Deal 1 damage to an ally you control.

name: Agger Imperative
text:
When Revealed (Alter-Ego): Minotaur schemes. Place 1 investment counter on Roxxon Energy. When Revealed (Hero): Minotaur attacks you. Place 1 investment counter on Roxxon Energy.
[star] Boost: Place 1 investment counter on Roxxon Energy.

name: Dark Reinforcements
text: When Revealed: If there are less than 4 [[DARK COUNCIL]] minions in the victory display, put a random set-aside Dark Council side scheme into play. If no side scheme entered play this way, this card gains surge. Boost: This attack gains overkill.

name: Building Strength
text: Attach to the villain. Uses (2 strategy counters). [star] Forced Response: After Minotaur schemes, remove 1 strategy counter from this card â†' give Minotaur one facedown boost card.

name: Ferocious Ambition
text: Attach to the villain. [star] Forced Response: After Minotaur attacks you, place 1 threat on each side scheme. If there are no side schemes in play place 2 investment counters on Roxxon Energy instead. Then, discard Ferocious Ambition. * Boost: Reveal this card.

name: Privacy Concern
text:
NOTIFICATION. When Revealed: Discard the top X cards of your deck and the encounter deck, where X is the number of cards in your hand. If this caused at least one deck to empty, this card gains surge.
[star] Boost: Discard the top 2 cards of each deck.

name: Small Print
text:
NOTIFICATION. When Revealed: Exhaust each , [[TECH]], [[WEAPON]] or [[VEHICLE]] you control. If no cards were exhausted this way, this card gains surge.
[star] Boost: Exhaust a support you control.

name: Cease And Desist
text:
NOTIFICATION. When Revealed: Discard an [[ITEM]], [[TECH]], [[WEAPON]] or [[VEHICLE]] you control. If no card was discarded this way, this card gains surge.
[star] Boost: If this activation is a scheme, confuse your identity.

name: Patent Claim
text: Attach to your identity. Forced Interrupt: Increase the resource cost of each [[ITEM]], [[TECH]], [[WEAPON]] or [[VEHICLE]] you play by 1. Alter-ego Action: Spend 2 mental resources â†' discard this card.

name: Public Statement
text:
Attach to the villain. Forced Response: After the villain schemes, discard cards from the encounter deck until a side scheme is discarded, then reveal that side scheme. Discard this card.
[star] Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: "Tell me why I shouldn't kill you."
name: Laufey
text: Toughness. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Laufey initiates an attack, if he has at least 8 [per_hero] remaining hit points, either stun your hero or deal 1 damage to an ally you control.

name: Laufey
text: Toughness. When Revealed: Deal 1 damage to the Thor ally. [star]Forced Interrupt: When Laufey initiates an attack, if he has at least 10 [per_hero] remaining hit points, either stun your hero or deal 1 damage to an ally you control.

name: Laufey
text: Toughness. When Revealed: Deal 1 damage to the Thor ally. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Laufey initiates an attack, if he has at least 12[per_hero] remaining hit points, either stun your hero or deal 2 damage to an ally you control.

name: Journey To Jotunheim
text: Contents: Laufey (I) and Laufey (II). (Laufey (II) and Laufey (III) instead for expert mode.) Laufey and Standard encounter sets. One modular encounter set (recommended: Uncharted Territory). Setup: Create the Expedition deck (see insert) and reveal the top card of it. Put the Thor ally and King of the Frost Giants attachment into play. Put a Frost Giant Archer into play with each player. Shuffle the encounter deck. Advance to 1B.

name: Journey To Jotunheim
text: [star] Forced Response: After resolving step one of the villain phase, discard each [[EXPEDITION]] environment in play. Then reveal the top card of the expedition deck. Forced Response: After this scheme is completed, deal 2 damage to the Thor ally. Then remove all threat from this scheme.

name: King Of The Frost Giants
text: Permanent. Attach to Laufey. Laufey gains stalwart. Hero Action: Spend [physical][physical] resources → until the end of the round, treat this card's printed text box as if it were blank.

flavor: "Thor may be key to saving not only our world, but all ten realms."-- Captain America
name: Blizzard
text: Forced Response: After an ally enters play, exhaust that ally.

flavor: "That's not a mission. Something that epic should be called a quest." - Spider-Man
name: Icy Passage
text: Each friendly character gets -1 THW.

flavor: "I say we just follow the river of Frost Giant blood." - Spider-Man
name: Steep Incline
text: Each friendly character gets -1 ATK.

flavor: "My ears are too cold to hear anything." -Spider-Man
name: Unending Cold
text: Forced Interrupt: As an additional cost to perform a basic REC, that player must discard 1 card from their hand.

flavor: "We need to keep moving." - Captain America
name: Thick Fog
text: Forced Interrupt: As an additional cost to perform a basic DEF, that player must discard 1 card from their hand.

flavor: "Is that all you've got, Giants?" - Thor
name: Deep Freeze
text: Each player gets -1 hand size.

flavor: "I hear someone screaming." â€“ Wolverine
name: Frosty Winds
text: Forced Response: After an upgrade enters play, exhaust it.

name: Frost Giant Archer
text: Frost Giant Archer enters play with 1 ambush counter on it. While there is at least 1 ambush counter on Frost Giant Archer, it cannot take damage. Forced Response: After Frost Giant Archer attacks, remove 1 ambush counter from it. [star] Frost Giant Archer's attacks gain piercing and ranged.

name: Frost Giant Enforcer
text:
Toughness. Guard.
Reduce the amount of damage Frost Giant Enforcer takes from attacks by 1.

name: Frost Beast
text:
Toughness. Patrol. Forced Response: After Frost Beast attacks and defeats a character you control, take 1 indirect damage.
[star] Boost: If you are not engaged with a minion, put this minion into play engaged with you.

name: Laufey's Club
text:
Attach to Laufey. Uses (1+[per_hero] smash counters). [star] Forced Interrupt: When Laufey attacks, remove 1 smash counter from this card â†' that attacks gain overkill.
[star] Boost: This attack gains overkill.

name: Isolated Position
text:
Attach to your identity. Allies you control cannot defend. Forced Response: After Laufey attacks your hero, discard this card.
[star] Boost: If this attack defeats an ally, attach this card to your identity.

name: Giant Hand Grapple
text: [[CONDITION.]] Attach to a character you control. Attached character cannot ready, attack, thwart or defend. Hero Action: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[GIANT]] minion and put it into play engaged with you â†' discard this card.

flavor: ATTACK.
name: Swinging Club
text: When Revealed: Either deal 3 damage to your identity or deal 2 damage to the Thor ally. [star] Boost: Either give this card 2 boost icons ([boost]) or deal 1 damage to the Thor ally.

name: Treacherous Conditions
text:
Surge. When Revealed: Reveal the top card of the expedition deck.
[star] Boost: Reveal the top card of the expedition deck.

name: Bloodcycle Canyon
text: When Revealed: Each [[GIANT]] minion engaged with you activates. If no minions activated this way, search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[GIANT]] minion and put it into play engaged with you.

name: Giants Of Jotunheim
text:
When Revealed: Give each [[GIANT]] enemy a tough status card.
[star] Boost: Give Laufey a tough status card and another boost card.

name: Storm Of Giants
text: Hinder 2[per_hero]. [[GIANT]] minions gain surge. Forced Interrupt: When a [[GIANT]] minion is defeated, shuffle that minion into the encounter deck. Response: After this scheme is defeated, each player either draws a card or heals 3 damage from their identity.

name: Berserker Thor
text: Hinder 2[per_hero]. The Thor ally takes +1 consequential damage after he attacks or thwarts. Response: After this scheme is defeated, heal 2 damage from the Thor ally.

name: What Was That?
text: When Revealed (Alter-ego): Change to hero form. When Revealed (Hero): Exhaust your identity. If you cannot, this card gains surge.

name: Round In Circles
text:
When Revealed: Resolve the 'When Revealed' ability of the topmost treachery in the encounter discard pile not named Round in Circles.
[star] Boost: After this activation, shuffle this card into the encounter deck.

name: Low On Supplies
text: If your discard pile has more cards than your deck, this card gains surge. When Revealed: Choose to either discard a card from your hand or remove the top card of your deck from the game.

flavor: You should have turned back around.
name: Ambushed!
text: Hinder 1[per_hero]. Players engaged with minions cannot remove threat from this scheme. When Revealed: Each minion engaged with you activates.

flavor: â€œYour bleeding has scarcely begun.â€
name: Malekith
text: Forced Interrupt: Malekith gets +1 ATK for each [[MAGIC]] attachment in play. Malekith cannot be defeated while there are [[CONQUERED TERRITORY]] side schemes in play.

name: Malekith
text: [star] Forced Interrupt: Malekith gets +1 ATK for each [[MAGIC]] attachment in play. When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[MAGIC]] attachment. Reveal that card, then place 1 energy counter on it.

flavor: "Your bleeding has scarcely begun."
name: Malekith
text: [star] Forced Interrupt: Malekith gets +1 ATK for each [[MAGIC]] attachment in play. Malekith cannot be defeated while there are [[CONQUERED TERRITORY]] side schemes in play.

name: Malekith
text: [star] Forced Interrupt: Malekith gets +1 ATK for each [[MAGIC]] attachment in play. When Revealed: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for two [[MAGIC]] attachments. Reveal those cards, then place 1 energy counter on each.

flavor: Malekith has invaded Earth as the War of the Realms reaches it's ultimate end.
name: Invasion Of Midgard
text: Contents: Malekith (1A). (Malekith (2A) instead for expert mode.) Malekith and Standard encounter sets. One modular encounter set (recommended: Svartalfheim). Setup: Reveal each [[CONQUERED TERRITORY]] side scheme and put it into play. Advance to stage 1B.

name: Invasion Of Midgard
text: Forced Interrupt: When threat would be placed on this scheme, divide it as evenly as possible among [[CONQUERED TERRITORY]] side schemes instead. Forced Response: After resolving step one of the villain phase, place 1 invasion counter here. Then if there are 3 invasion counters here, advance to stage 2A.

flavor: The capital of New Svartalfheim is the setting for the furious final front against Malekith's armies.
name: Battle Of Stonehenge
text: When Revealed: Deal each player X facedown encounter cards, where X is the number of [[CONQUERED TERRITORY]] side schemes in play.

name: Battle Of Stonehenge
text: When Revealed: Place 1 energy counter on each [[MAGIC]] attachment in play. If this stage is completed, the players lose the game.

flavor: Laufey and the Frost Giants now rule over North America.
name: New Jotunheim
text: Victory 1. Interrupt: When a character thwarts this side scheme, they may use their ATK instead of their THW. When Defeated: Each player readies a character they control.

flavor: The sorceress Enchantress claims the continent of South America.
name: The Dusk Lands
text: Victory 1. Interrupt: When a character thwarts this side scheme, they may use their ATK instead of their THW. When Defeated: Confuse an enemy.

flavor: Africa is where the throne of Heven now lies after Malekith's invasion.
name: New Heven
text: Victory 1. Interrupt: When a character thwarts this side scheme, they may use their ATK instead of their THW. When Defeated: Each player draws a card.

flavor: The Fire Demons now hold the lands of Russia and Asia.
name: New Muspelheim
text: Victory 1. Interrupt: When a character thwarts this side scheme, they may use their ATK instead of their THW. When Defeated: Heal 2 damage from each identity.

flavor: Ulik's forces reign over Oceania.
name: Kingdom Of The Trolls
text: Victory 1. Interrupt: When a character thwarts this side scheme, they may use their ATK instead of their THW. When Defeated: Stun an enemy.

flavor: Dario Agger has been given all of Antarctica to exploit for it's natural resources.
name: Kingdom Of Roxxon Inc
text: Victory 1. Interrupt: When a character thwarts this side scheme, they may use their ATK instead of their THW. When Defeated: Give each identity a tough status card.

flavor: Malekith takes Europe and names it the home of the Dark Elves.
name: New Svartalfheim
text: Victory 1. Interrupt: When a character thwarts this side scheme, they may use their ATK instead of their THW. When Defeated: Choose and discard a MAGIC attachment.

name: Mystic Flight
text:
Attach to the villain. Uses (2 energy counters). Forced Response: After resolving step one of the villain phase, remove 1 energy counter from here â†' place 1 threat on the main scheme.
[star] Boost: Place 1 threat on the main scheme.

name: Protective Barrier
text:
Attach to the villain. Uses (2 energy counters). Forced Interrupt: When Malekith would be dealt 2 or more damage, remove 1 energy counter from here â†' reduce the amount of damage dealt by 2.
[star] Boost: Give Malekith a tough status card.

name: Shapeshifting
text: Attach to the villain. Uses (2 energy counters). [star] Forced Interrupt: When Malekith schemes, discard the top 3 cards of the encounter deck and remove 1 energy counter from here â†' Malekith gets +1 SCH for each minion discarded this way.

flavor: "There'll be no running from this fight, little bugs of Midgard."
name: Energy Wave
text: Attach to the villain. Uses (2 energy counters). [star] Forced Interrupt: When Malekith attacks, remove 1 energy counter from here â†' either discard an ally from your hand or give this attack overkill.

name: Mystic Endurance
text: Attach to the villain. Uses (2 energy counters). Forced Response: After resolving step one of the villain phase, remove 1 energy counter from here â†' heal 2 damage from Malekith and remove a confused or stunned status card from him.

name: Ebony Blade
text:
Attach to the villain. [star] Forced Response: After Malekith attacks and defeats an ally, that ally's owner either discards 2 cards from their hand or removes that ally from the game. Hero Action: Spend [physical] [physical] resources → discard this card.
[star] Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: "Welcome to the War of the Realms, you fools."
name: Conqueror Of The Realms
text: Surge. When Revealed: Discard cards from the encounter deck until a [[MAGIC]] attachment is discarded. Reveal that card.

name: King Of Svartalfheim
text:
Surge. When Revealed: Shuffle each [[MAGIC]] attachment in the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck.
[star] Boost: Resolve this card's 'When Revealed' ability.

name: The Accursed
text: When Revealed (Alter-Ego): Place 2 threat on the main scheme. Place 1 energy counter on a [[MAGIC]] attachment. When Revealed (Hero): Take 3 damage. Place 1 energy counter on a [[MAGIC]] attachment.

name: Black Bifrost
text: Uses (1 [per_hero] teleport counters). Forced Response: After resolving step one of the villain phase, remove 1 teleport counter from here â†' discard cards from the encounter deck until a minion is discarded. Put that minion into play engaged with the first player.

name: Alligator Tank
text:
[star] Alligator Tank's attacks deal indirect damage. When Defeated: Malekith activates against you.
[star] Boost: If this activation is an attack, it deals indirect damage.

name: War Dog
text: Guard. [star] Forced Interrupt: War Dog gets +1 ATK and gains overkill if your identity is exhausted.

flavor: If you can help Thor access his full powers, he could turn the war in your favour!
name: Aiding The Worthy
text: Hinder 1 [per_hero]. When Defeated: Choose a MAGIC attachment on the villain. Discard that attachment.

name: Dark Elf Assassin
text: Quickstrike. [star] Forced Interrupt: Dark Elf Assassin's attacks gain piercing. Forced Response: After Dark Elf Assassin attacks and defeats a friendly character, give the villain 1 facedown boost card.

name: Dark Elf Bomber
text: Dark Elf Bomber can only be damaged by basic attacks. Forced Interrupt: At the end of the player phase, the engaged player discards an upgrade or support they control. If a card was discarded this way, give the villain 1 facedown boost card and discard Dark Elf Bomber.

name: From The Shadows
text:
When Revealed: Each [[DARK ELF]] minion engaged with you activates. If no [[DARK ELF]] minion is engaged with you, give the villain 1 facedown boost card.
[star] Boost: Place 1 threat on the main scheme. Take 1 damage.

flavor: The Dark Elves work to escalate their Kingâ€™s plans.
name: Armies Of Svartalfheim
text: When Defeated: Give the villain 1 facedown boost card.

name: Roxxon Factories
text: Setup. Permanent. Attach to Roxxon Energy While Roxxon's stock is high, this card gains one acceleration icon ([acceleration]).

flavor: Malekith has set the Mangog loose and it is hell-bent on destroying the heroes of Asgard, who have requested your assistance!
name: Mangog Rampage
text: Hinder 3 [per_hero]. Victory 1.

name: Malekith's Venom Blade
text:
Attach to Malekith. Forced Response: After Malekith attacks and defeats an ally, remove that ally from the game. Then discard this card.
[star] Boost: Reveal this card.

flavor: Peril.
name: Butcher Of Thors
text:
When Revealed: Malekith attacks a hero of your choice with the [[ASGARD]] trait. If no attack was made this way, this card gains surge.
[star] Boost: Stun your identity.

flavor: Malekith has captured the Venom symbiote and is using dark magic to bend it to his will.
name: Power Of The Symbiote
text: When Revealed: Summon Malekith's Venom Blade and reveal it.

flavor: "Ah, Jotunheim. A more miserable, icy Hel you could not imagine." â€”Loki
name: Frostbite
text: Your hero cannot use basic powers. Alter-Ego Action: Take up to 2 damage â†' discard this card. If you took 2 damage, remove this card from the game instead.
